heading: Separability
label: 1721 Separability
text: If any provision of this subchapter or of any amendment made by this subchapter, or the application of any such provision to any person or circumstance, is held invalid, the remainder of the provisions of this subchapter and of the amendments made by this subchapter and the application of such provision to other persons or circumstances shall not be affected thereby.
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this part”, meaning part A of title II of , , , which is classified generally to this subchapter.Pub. L. 93–38088 Stat. 519Aug. 21, 1974
Effective DateSection effective on and after sixtieth day after , see , set out as a note under .Aug. 21, 1974section 2(c) of Pub. L. 93–380section 1221–1 of this title
